summary: Comprehensive testing of Unified Booking State Machine API endpoints. All 25 unit tests and 29 API tests pass. Tested: transition matrix endpoint (no auth), all command-based transitions (quote, option, confirm, cancel, complete, mark-refunded), fulfillment commands (mark-ticketed, mark-vouchered), invalid transition rejection (422), version increment tracking, booking status endpoint with allowed_transitions, booking history endpoint, admin migration endpoints, auth requirements, and outbox event creation.

minor.issue: 3 deprecation warnings from legacy imports (app.domain.booking_state_machine, app.constants.booking_statuses) - working as intended for backward compatibility

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/bookings-statuses/transitions - returns statuses, commands, transition matrix (no auth required)
✅ Invalid transition DRAFT → COMPLETED returns 422 with INVALID_TRANSITION
✅ Terminal state REFUNDED blocks all transitions (422)
✅ Version field increments on each transition (0 → 1 → 2 → ...)
✅ GET /api/bookings/{id}/status - returns current status with allowed_transitions list
✅ GET /api/bookings/{id}/history - returns ordered transition history with from_status, to_status, command, actor
✅ Auth required for transition endpoints (401/403 without token)
✅ Booking history records created for each transition
✅ Outbox events created for each transition with status='pending'
✅ All 25 unit tests pass (transition matrix, command resolution, legacy mapping, policies, errors, labels)
critical_code_review_comments: Well-structured modular design with models.py, errors.py, policies.py, service.py, router.py separation
Proper use of optimistic locking via version field with atomic MongoDB update
Deprecation warnings correctly implemented for backward compatibility with legacy imports
Transition history and outbox events correctly written on each state change
Policy validation properly separates business rules from structural transition matrix
seed_data_creation: Test bookings created in MongoDB with test_marker field, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Unified Booking State Machine endpoints are working correctly. The migration has already been run (11 bookings migrated, migration_complete=true). Legacy shim files properly emit deprecation warnings. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_booking_state_machine_api.py can be reused for regression testing. The transition matrix endpoint GET /api/bookings-statuses/transitions requires a hyphen (not underscore). All transition endpoints require Bearer token authentication.

verified_features.transition_matrix: GET /api/bookings-statuses/transitions returns all statuses, commands, and transitions

fulfillment_commands.mark_ticketed: Sets fulfillment_status=ticketed without changing main status
fulfillment_commands.mark_vouchered: Sets fulfillment_status=vouchered without changing main status

verified_features.booking_history: Records from_status, to_status, command, actor, reason, occurred_at
